testcase.name: TopupBalance_WithVoucher_SMS

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <201> but was <400>.

testcase.name: GetKpnPay

failure.message: Usage type mismatch in response! Expected KPN_PAY but found: KPN_REFUND expected [KPN_PAY] but found [KPN_REFUND]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Usage type mismatch in response! Expected KPN_PAY but found: KPN_REFUND expected [KPN_PAY] but found [KPN_REFUND] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at
